headline: Verizon (VZ) Faces A New Rival If Starlink Launches U.S. Mobile Service
summary: SpaceX is reportedly weighing a Starlink retail mobile internet service in the U.S., which would compete directly with Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ), AT&T, and T-Mobile. Starlink has secured wireless spectrum licenses and may choose to operate its own retail offering rather than rely on existing carrier partnerships. This potential entry could matter most in rural and underserved areas, where Starlink's satellite network may appeal to customers with limited traditional coverage...
